title: Grilled Dutch Coconut Pancakes
description: A tangy, bouncy pancake with a hint of sweet date, perfect for a cozy date night.
instructions: Preheat a griddle or cast-iron skillet over medium heat and lightly oil it with olive oil.
Blend coconut milk, eggs, vanilla, salt, and maple syrup until smooth.
In a separate bowl, whisk coconut flour with chopped dates and a pinch of salt.
Combine the wet mixture with the dry mixture, stirring until a thick batter forms; let rest 5 minutes.
Pour 2-3 tablespoons of batter onto the hot griddle, spreading thinly to form small pancakes.
Cook 2-3 minutes on each side or until golden brown and the edges lift from the surface.
Flip carefully using a spatula and grill the other side until fully cooked.
Serve the pancakes hot, drizzled with extra maple syrup and a sprinkle of toasted coconut flakes if desired.
